name: Bhai Narinder Singh (Fatehgarh Sahib)
body: Rooted in the Rababi tradition of music, Bhai Narinder Singh Ji is the son of notable ‘tabla’ player, Bhai Surjit Singh Ji, and grandson of the legendary Bhai Sarmukh Singh Fakkar of Gurdwara Janam Asthan Nankana Sahib. They initiated Bhai Narinder Singh into music and passed on their wealth of knowledge to him. He also received guidance from his maternal uncles, Bhai Prithipal Singh, Bhai Kishanpal Singh and Bhai Mohanpal Singh. Bhai Narinder Singh Ji is currently based at Fatehgarh Sahib and continues the legacy of his family.
If anyone has more recordings of Bhai Narinder Singh Ji to share, please contact us.
